name: chr17q11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 17 q-arm pericentric flank (17q11.1-17q11.2), the q-side sub-centromeric LCR shoreline. Distally adjoins the NF1-REP SD block (17q11.2 NF1 microdeletion). Alpha-satellite (D17Z1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline; distally adjacent to NF1-REP SDs.
